notes: the print is still about 15 percent larger than target — reduce it further, following the measurements below

LETTER-BY-LETTER SPELLING LOCK for the small caption line, the single most error-prone element: the eleven characters are exactly ( B R A S I L   S A C R O ). Render each letter with its correct closed/open counter shape: B has two closed bumps, R has a straight leg kicking out at the bottom-right, A is a triangle with a crossbar, S is an S-curve, I is a single vertical stroke, L is an L-shape. Take extra care on the R immediately after B — it must have a diagonal leg, not a closed loop.
